summary: Integrated ADR 0330 onto the latest realistic exact-main tree by replaying the repo-relative controller-secret contract, fork-first example inventory/provider/publication surfaces, and public reference documentation across repeated `origin/main` advances until the final base `c48bdae01f6fe4d0df004e247baa8a3d9f6e013b`, refreshing canonical truth and generated surfaces plus the topology snapshot after the ADR 0333 overlay replay changed merged inventory inputs, and rerunning the focused regression slice, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` successfully while the realistic repository version remains `0.178.3` because unrelated waiver blockers still prevent a fresh numbered release cut.

verification.observed: The branch-local ADR 0330 receipt already proved the repo-relative controller-secret contract, fork-first sample surfaces, discovery refresh, focused regression slice, ownership validation, and receipt validation on the isolated worktree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/2026-04-04-adr-0330-public-github-readiness-live-apply.json`.

verification.check: Exact-main canonical truth and generated surfaces
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --write`, `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_release_notes.py --write-root-summaries`, `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_status_docs.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/platform_manifest.py --write`, `python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, and `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_topology_snapshot.py --output scripts/topology-snapshot.json` refreshed the exact-main registry, changelog, latest receipt ledger, root status summaries, manifest, coordination diagram, and topology snapshot after the final `origin/main` replay brought ADR 0333 overlay inputs into the merged inventory, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge4-registry-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge4-canonical-truth-write-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge4-canonical-truth-check-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge4-release-notes-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge4-status-docs-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge4-platform-manifest-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge4-diagrams-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge5-topology-snapshot-r1.txt`.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_controller_automation_toolkit.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/test_ntfy_publish.py tests/test_public_reference_samples.py` returned `65 passed in 4.93s` on the final latest-main replay, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge6-targeted-tests-r1.txt`.

`python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` still reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, and a blocked release cut because unrelated `controller_dependency_gap` waivers remain open through `2026-04-06`; `python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch --dry-run` shows the next candidate version would be `0.178.4`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge6-release-status-r1.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge6-release-dry-run-r1.txt`.

`python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models generated-docs generated-portals`, and `git diff --check` all passed on the final exact-main tree after the receipt refresh and topology snapshot correction, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge6-live-apply-receipts-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge6-validate-repo-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge6-git-diff-check-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main broad automation and push-gate replay
verification.observed: `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` all passed on the final latest-main candidate. `make remote-validate` reached the remote builder first, then exercised the governed local fallback, where all selected blocking checks passed; `make pre-push-gate` then passed the full primary-branch lane set on the same replayed tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge6-make-validate-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge6-remote-validate-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0330-postmerge6-pre-push-gate-r1.txt`.

notes: This exact-main receipt captures the protected-surface integration separately from the earlier branch-local live-apply proof so the fork-first implementation work and the canonical mainline refresh remain independently auditable.

On 2026-04-04, `origin/main` advanced three separate times while this closeout was in flight; the final validated base ended at `origin/main@c48bdae01f6fe4d0df004e247baa8a3d9f6e013b`, and the last cleanup refreshed `scripts/topology-snapshot.json` after the merged ADR 0333 overlay inputs changed inventory truth.

ADR 0330 is implemented on `main`, but `Implemented In Repo Version` remains `not yet` because the global release manager still refuses a fresh numbered cut while unrelated `controller_dependency_gap` waivers remain open through `2026-04-06`.

The final latest-main verification passed with the governed remote-builder fallback: `make remote-validate` failed remotely, reran locally by policy, and every selected blocking check passed before `make pre-push-gate` completed the full primary-branch lane set.
Because ADR 0330 is a repo-only control-plane change, the live platform version remains `0.130.98` and no platform version bump should accompany this integration.
